openQuestions.question: Approve exact labels for the proposed parent-hub ambiguity fixture before freezing it into the 007 ratchet family.
Decide whether any measured overlay conflicts should graduate to live graph-metadata conflicts_with edges.

resolvedQuestions.answer: Layer-1b remains half-landed: deep-loop-workflows metadata still projects code-audit terms and scorer code compensates with codeAuditDeepReviewPenalty.
Frozen scorer code should retain exact syntax/command anchors; parent-hub vocabulary should move to metadata with cross-hub ownership checks.
Guard coverage must mirror advisor projection buckets, not just graph derived.trigger_phrases.
Metadata cleanup must be an atomic reindex, guard, ratchet, and recapture operation.

keyFindings.finding: deep-loop-workflows still projects single-pass code-audit vocabulary while fusion.ts carries a compensating penalty.
parent-hub-vocab-sync checks derived.trigger_phrases but advisor projection also scores intent_signals and derived keyword fields.
Parent-hub compatibility needs a labeled ambiguity slice because existing aggregate accuracy hides contested prompts.
semantic_shadow false-fires should first be addressed through description/trigger hygiene, not lane-weight changes.

ruledOutDirections: Tune lane weights before adding parent-hub ambiguity labels
Treat every key_file/source_doc as a user-facing alias
Author conflicts_with edges for every hub overlap
Use live SQLite mutation for read-only scorer experiments
